# Arden Full Index

> Expanded machine-readable index for Arden documentation and site resources.

## Core Pages
- Homepage: https://www.arden-lang.dev/
- Installation: https://www.arden-lang.dev/install
- Documentation Overview: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/overview
- Changelog: https://www.arden-lang.dev/changelog
- Search: https://www.arden-lang.dev/search
- Terms of Use: https://www.arden-lang.dev/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://www.arden-lang.dev/privacy
- Creator: https://www.theremyyy.dev/

## Documentation
- Arden Overview: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/overview
- Installation: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/getting_started/installation
- Quick Start: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/getting_started/quick_start
- Editor Setup: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/getting_started/editor_setup
- Syntax: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/basics/syntax
- Variables: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/basics/variables
- Types: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/basics/types
- Control Flow: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/basics/control_flow
- Functions: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/functions
- Classes: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/classes
- Interfaces: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/interfaces
- Enums: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/enums
- Range Types: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/ranges
- Modules: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/modules
- Multi-File Projects: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/projects
- Projects Guide Index: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/projects/README
- Testing: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/testing
- Standard Library: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/overview
- Math Module: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/math
- Str Module (Strings): https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/string
- Time Module: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/time
- Args Module: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/args
- Collections: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/collections
- Input / Output (I/O): https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/io
- System Module: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/system
- Ownership and Borrowing: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/ownership
- Generics: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/generics
- Async / Await: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/async
- Error Handling: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/error_handling
- Memory Management: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/memory_management
- CLI Reference: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/compiler/cli
- Compiler Architecture: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/compiler/architecture
- Projects: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/projects
- Effects: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/effects
- Extern and FFI: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/ffi
- Attributes: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/attributes
- Language Edges: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/language_edges
- Packages and Imports: https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/packages_imports

## Machine Endpoints
- Sitemap: https://www.arden-lang.dev/sitemap.xml
- RSS: https://www.arden-lang.dev/rss.xml
- llms.txt: https://www.arden-lang.dev/llms.txt
